# Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Scope

- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Template update
- [ ] Architecture decision
- [ ] Safety or public-sanitization update

## Public Safety

- [ ] No real credentials, tokens, domains, IP addresses, customer names, or provider identifiers were added.
- [ ] Examples use placeholders such as `<project-name>` or `<registry-url>`.
- [ ] No deployment or infrastructure mutation commands were added.

## Validation

- [ ] `make validate-docs`
- [ ] `make check-placeholders`
- [ ] `make grep-secrets`
